title: Strange " escaping in -f csv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, description String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());

INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample', 'This is a description with a quote: " and a newline: 
');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'Example', NULL);
SELECT id, name, description FROM test_table WHERE description LIKE '%"%';
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'S%');
key_bug_features: Improper handling of escape characters in CSV output
